---
title: "12. 寓言、外物与言意边界"
subtitle: "Parable, External Things, and the Limits of Discourse"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 12
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "These chapters ask how language can point beyond itself without claiming total capture. Inverse-limit structure fits because doctrines and parables are finite approximations to a larger whole they can..."
---

**Chapters:** 26, 27, 33  
**Omega Directions:** `modular-tower-inverse-limit`, `rate-distortion-information-theory`, `spectral-theory`

{{< include articles/category_12_parable_external_things_discursive_limits.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_12_parable_external_things_discursive_limits Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_12_parable_external_things_discursive_limits_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_12_parable_external_things_discursive_limits_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_12_parable_external_things_discursive_limits_infographic.png)

---

[Back to Zhuangzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
